arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury blow ahead of crucial Real Madrid match
arts.sum: Arsenal have lost defender Ben White to an injury in training ahead of their Premier League game against Brentford and their all-important Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Real Madrid willing to play long game with Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly planning on making a move for Arsenal star William Saliba in either of the 2026 or 2027 summer transfer windows. Los Meringues are looking to bolster their defensive ranks after a series of injuries and lack of signings have depleted their depth in that part of the pitch. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Ben White Arsenal absence against Brentford as Real Madrid fear emerges
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta explains Ben White's absence from Arsenal's Premier League London derby with Brentford as Real Madrid fears emerge.

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer fresh injury blow as first-team star misses Brentford clash just four days before Champions League trip to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arteta now faces a nervous wait to see whether the player can recover in time for Wednesday night's Champions League quarter-final second leg in the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We have to give a good performance and get back our good feelings”

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta takes no chances with crucial Arsenal stars ahead of Real Madrid second leg
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has decided to rest a group of his key players for Arsenal's Premier League match against Brentford, with one eye on the huge Real Madrid match on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Chelsea offered chance to REIGNITE pursuit of 'next Mbappe'
arts.sum: PSG star Bradley Barcola is unsure about extending his contract, according to French media. PSG, it is claimed, want to extend the winger's contract and hand him improved terms, but Barcola has made it clear to the Parisians that he will not make a decision before the end of the season.
